items.name: auth
items.title: Auth (Supabase email/password)
items.description: Supabase email/password auth: /login page, /auth/callback route, proxy.ts session refresh + protected-route gating, and the lib/supabase client/server/admin/proxy helpers. Ships with supabase/seed.sql demo users (demo1@example.com, demo2@example.com, demo3@example.com — password: demo-password-123). Requires NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (server-only, used by lib/supabase/admin.ts).

items.name: billing
items.title: Billing (Stripe subscriptions)
items.description: Stripe billing block: /pricing, /settings/billing, /api/billing/*, /api/stripe/webhook, stripe helpers, entitlements, billing migrations. Disabled by default; set GIC_BILLING_ENABLED=true to enable user-facing billing. Soft-fail missing Stripe; hard-fail misconfigured. Env: GIC_BILLING_ENABLED, NEXT_PUBLIC_GIC_BILLING_ENABLED, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, APP_URL, STRIPE_PRICE_ID_BASIC|PRO|TEAM.

items.name: hello
items.title: Hello Badge
items.description: Smoke-test item for the @gic registry pipeline — a tiny badge that renders "GIC". No env requirements.

items.name: ui-base
items.title: GIC UI Base
items.description: Foundational UI primitives for GIC product repos — cn utility, Button, Input, Card, Badge, Alert, and MeasuredTextBlock (ported from the base repo template). No env requirements.
